# Source: Swiss Ephemeris 2.10.03 (libsw: # Local (topocentric) solar-eclipse circumstances. Times are TT (Terrestrial Time) Julian days: eclipse instants are DYNAMICAL
swe_sol_eclipse_when_glob/when_loc/how: matching the engine and the global corpus's greatest_eclipse_jd_tt (contrast rise-trans
which is UT). SE returns UT; converted TT = jd_ut + swe_deltat(jd_ut). Anchored via when_glob; when_loc gives topocentric contacts when locally visible.

swe_sol_eclipse_when_glob/when_loc/how: else global maximum (when_glob). se_c*_jd_tt: C1..C4 topocentric contacts; empty = absent (C2/C3 for partial-only
or all when not locally visible).
